variants.title: Fleetguard AF25483 Air Filter, Secondary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson P610904
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25483 Air Filter, Secondary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson P610904
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF25483 Magnum RS™ radial seal secondary air elements is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
specifications: Style: Air Safety, Radialseal, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Outer Diameter: 84.3 mm, Inner Diameter: 64.8 mm, Length: 264.7 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011

variants.title: Donaldson P610904 Air Safety, Radialseal
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P610904 Air Safety, Radialseal is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Air Safety, Radialseal, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Outer Diameter: 84.3 mm, Inner Diameter: 64.8 mm, Length: 264.7 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011
